code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> PENDING: Order Placed

    PENDING --> PAID: Payment Authorized & Escrowed
    PENDING --> CANCELLED: Payment Failed

    PAID --> SHIPPED: Seller Ships Order
    PAID --> CANCELLED: Seller Cancels

    SHIPPED --> DELIVERED: Carrier Reports Delivery
    SHIPPED --> CANCELLED: Delivery Failed

    DELIVERED --> COMPLETED: Delivery Confirmed (auto or manual)
    DELIVERED --> DISPUTED: Customer Raises Dispute

    DISPUTED --> COMPLETED: Dispute Resolved - Favor Seller
    DISPUTED --> CANCELLED: Dispute Resolved - Favor Customer (Refund)

    COMPLETED --> [*]: Funds Released to Seller
    CANCELLED --> [*]: Funds Refunded to Customer

    note right of PENDING
        Data: order_id, total_amount
        Escrow: Not yet created
    end note

    note right of PAID
        Data: payment_id, escrow_id
        Escrow: Funds held
        Trigger: Seller notification sent
    end note

    note right of SHIPPED
        Data: tracking_number, carrier
        Escrow: Still held
        Trigger: Customer notification sent
    end note

    note right of DELIVERED
        Data: delivered_at timestamp
        Escrow: Still held
        Auto-confirm: Timer starts
    end note

    note right of COMPLETED
        Data: confirmed_at timestamp
        Escrow: Released to seller
        Final state
    end note

    note right of DISPUTED
        Data: dispute_reason, dispute_date
        Escrow: Frozen until resolution
        Manual: Admin intervention
    end note

    note right of CANCELLED
        Data: cancelled_at, cancel_reason
        Escrow: Refunded to customer
        Final state
    end note
repo_description: System design skill for Claude Code using EventStorming and Mermaid diagrams

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个订单履约的状态机，核心是资金托管机制。起点是PENDING，然后分支到PAID或CANCELLED——支付成功进托管，失败直接取消。
确认一下：PENDING到PAID的触发条件是"Payment Authorized & Escrowed"，托管资金创建；到CANCELLED则是"Payment Failed"。这两个分支是互斥的吧？
对，互斥。PAID之后卖家发货进入SHIPPED，这里要记录tracking_number和carrier。另外卖家在PAID阶段也可以主动取消。
好的，SHIPPED到DELIVERED是物流回传，DELIVERED之后有个自动确认机制——timer启动，客户可以手动确认或者等自动完成。
DELIVERED还要能进DISPUTED，客户发起纠纷。纠纷有两种出口：判卖家赢则到COMPLETED，判客户赢则到CANCELLED并退款。这两个都是终态。
终态的资金流向：COMPLETED是"Funds Released to Seller"，CANCELLED是"Funds Refunded to Customer"，这样对吗？
没错。每个状态右侧加note，标注data、escrow状态和trigger。比如PAID的note要包含payment_id、escrow_id，托管状态是"Funds held"，还要触发卖家通知。
已补充所有note：PENDING的escrow是"Not yet created"；SHIPPED和DELIVERED都是"Still held"；DISPUTED是"Frozen until resolution"且需要admin手动介入；COMPLETED和CANCELLED标注Final state。
等等，SHIPPED到CANCELLED的条件应该是"Delivery Failed"物流失败，不是卖家取消——卖家在PAID阶段取消，物流失败是另一个分支。
已修正：PAID -- CANCELLED是"Seller Cancels"，SHIPPED -- CANCELLED是"Delivery Failed"。现在逻辑清晰了，检查一遍终态和资金流转都正确。
